All right, way in day overview. What are we going to be doing on the way in day? Let's get into it. So number one, we are going to be talking about scheduling, duration, so how long are they going to be there for, how many per time slot, and who's going to be doing the way in days. Next, we are going to talk about the tech that they're going to need for the challenge, the food list that we are going to be giving them, taking some stats on them, and we are going to be recording all of the stats on our tracker. Then we are going to sit down and explain the nutrition to them and go over exactly how to follow the plan for the first two weeks before we meet with them again in the next two weeks and then we meet with them again. So then we're going to be talking about supplements, and this is where you are going to use your supplement sales training to sell them supplements. Then finally, we are going to take some pictures. However, you do not have to take pictures in this scenario because they could just take the pictures at home and you might get some better quality pictures or at least a little more revealing pictures that will be better for testimonials than they'd be comfortable like doing at the gym. Right, so and they could send those to you via voxer. However, if you want to, you can take pictures at your gym as well and this would be a great time to get them. So a final reminder, keep the no-sale-sale challengers or at-gym challengers that are doing it with your classes and everything. Keep those separate. You don't want to have a difference between the two groups, but it is recommended that you will do these one-on-one. It's recommended that you'll be doing a one-on-one way-in-day because this is a private relationship that you have with them based on your sale and that it's one-on-one coaching that they're paying for. So it would make the most sense for them to conduct this meeting just like all the rest of the meetings that they're going to have one-on-one. Doesn't mean that they're not going to be in a Facebook group with other challengers, but as far as how the relationship is, we want to keep that private so they get that premium experience.
